channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Blackstone-owned AirTrunk secures record $1.24B loan for Tokyo AI data center
item.description: A consortium of 12 banks, led by SMBC, MUFG, Crédit Agricole CIB and Société Générale, arranged the record financing for AirTrunk’s Tokyo data center expansion.

item.title: Hyperliquid’s tokenized futures hit $1.2B as traders bet on oil, stocks
item.description: Trading has been driven largely by tokenized futures on equities and commodities such as oil, gold and silver.

item.title: Ether treasury firm Bitmine moves $19.5 million in ETH to Coinbase Prime
item.description: The largest public ether holder sent two transfers totaling $19.5 million to Coinbase Prime hot wallets on Tuesday, though the moves don't necessarily signal selling.

item.title: Tron joins Agentic AI Foundation as founder sees future in AI
item.description: Tron joined the Linux Foundation’s Agentic AI Foundation to help develop open infrastructure for AI agents alongside members including Circle and JPMorgan.

item.title: Pudgy Penguins launches its 'Club Penguin' moment, and the game doesn't feel like crypto at all
item.description: Pudgy World went live with 12 towns, plot-based quests, and mini-games in what the team calls "one of the most technically advanced browser-based games ever created." The PENGU token jumped 9% on the news.

item.title: Wall Street Banks Weigh Lawsuit Over Crypto Banking Charters
item.description: The potential lawsuit adds to existing tension between traditional lenders and crypto firms over access to the U.S. financial system.

item.title: Here's how traders and big buyers stepped in to keep bitcoin steady during the oil shock
item.description: Several market participants, including MSTR and OTC traders, kept demand steady, helping BTC stay resilient.

item.title: Bhutan moves $11.8M in BTC from its national stash: Arkham
item.description: Bhutan has accumulated around 13,000 Bitcoin since launching state-backed mining operations in 2019, primarily fueled by hydroelectric energy.

item.title: Vitalik Buterin envisions ‘one-click’ Ether staking for institutions
item.description: “We want the authority over staking nodes to be highly distributed, and the first step to doing this is to make it easy,” said Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin.

item.title: US prosecutors seek Roman Storm retrial after mixed verdict
item.description: Manhattan US Attorney Jay Clayton asked a judge to schedule a retrial in October for Tornado Cash co-founder Roman Storm on two charges where the jury failed to reach a verdict.

item.title: AI tokens rally after Nvidia open-source agent plan, beat CoinDesk 20
item.description: The AI-linked cryptocurrencies moved higher after a report from Wired said Nvidia is planning an open-source platform for autonomous AI agents.

item.title: Wall Street funneled $540M into US Solana ETFs in Q4: Bloomberg
item.description: Investment advisors were the biggest buyers of the US-based spot Solana ETFs at over $270 million, while hedge fund managers came in next at $186 million.

item.title: Bhutan sells $42.5 million of bitcoin in 2026 as national stack drops 58% from peak
item.description: The Himalayan kingdom moved another 175 BTC on Monday, continuing a drawdown that has taken its holdings from a peak of roughly 13,000 BTC to under 5,400 in just over a year.

item.title: Sharplink reports $735M loss in 2025 as Ethereum slumped
item.description: Sharplink says it will continue to acquire Ether despite a brutal crypto market sell-off last year that led to a $616.2 million paper loss on its ETH holdings.

item.title: Trump's DOJ Seeks October Retrial for Tornado Cash Developer Roman Storm
item.description: The DOJ is attempting to retry Tornado Cash developer Roman Storm even as the U.S. Treasury acknowledges mixers may have legitimate uses.

item.title: Ether, solana, XRP jump higher as Trump signals Iran war nearing end
item.description: Major altcoins bounced alongside risk assets on Tuesday after the president said U.S. military objectives were "pretty well complete."

item.title: Oil tumbles, crypto gains as Trump sends mixed signals over Iran war
item.description: “I think the war is very complete, pretty much,” Donald Trump told reporters before posting on his social media platform later that “Death, Fire, and Fury” will reign upon Iran.

item.title: Bitcoin jumps past $70,000 as war volatility fades
item.description: BTC rebounded from about $65,000 as crude oil retreated and institutional flows helped stabilize the market.

item.title: AI firm Anthropic sues Trump admin over ‘supply chain risk’ label
item.description: Anthropic is the first US company the Pentagon has labeled a risk to the military, with the AI company calling it “unprecedented and unlawful.”

item.title: US banking lobby weighs lawsuit against OCC over crypto trust charters
item.description: The OCC has granted conditional approvals to several crypto firms since December, including BitGo, Ripple, Paxos, and Crypto.com, while others such as Zerohash have filed applications.

item.title: NFT lending protocol Gondi says platform secured after $230K exploit
item.description: Gondi said only the Sell & Repay smart contract was affected and that it is safe to continue buying, selling, trading and listing NFTs on the platform.

item.title: 🔥 UPDATE: Ethereum leads all chains in 2026 with +$2.1B in net capital flows, per Artemis. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE4wVEdXb0lWTmpqZHpLaTRiNVlIRklvWDgxVXJyV2lfbFlsbVJCS2xsaENlUEdZaFNVbDZmUU5xOUxXMkpsVldkdVZReTVhOUc4QjRJVmllbGFDLS1VS205cEJ3Zjk?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 UPDATE: Ethereum leads all c…

item.title: Elon Musk’s Grok Faces UK Backlash After AI Posts Mock Football Tragedies
item.description: Liverpool and Manchester United have complained after Grok mocked the Hillsborough and Munich tragedies on Monday.

item.title: Zcash devs raise $25M from major VCs months after ECC split
item.description: The Zcash token rose 4.1% to $217.80 on news of the $25 million funding round and is now up 9.8% over the last 24 hours.

item.title: Bitcoin Shows ‘Tentative Signs of Improvement’ as Iran Conflict Fears Wane
item.description: Oil’s sharp swing and renewed Bitcoin ETF inflows highlight a fragile rebound as on-chain data suggest crypto market stress may be easing.

item.title: Trump's threat to block Congress over voter-ID law leaves crypto bill on shakier ground
item.description: At a Republican event, the U.S. president delivered a speech that doubled down on recent comments he won't sign anything else until he gets the voting bill.

item.title: Bitcoin vs gold: ETF flows point to early capital rotation signs
item.description: Bitcoin ETF inflows have turned positive as gold ETFs see record outflows after a historic rally. Is capital beginning to rotate from gold to Bitcoin?

item.title: The Ethereum Foundation is using DVT-lite to stake 72,000 ETH: firefly.social/post/x/2026218… My hope for this project is that in the process, we can make it maximally easy and one-click to do distributed staking for institutions. Choose which computers run yo - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE5ZMVhoQm1OX2hUUjdGeUgyakFlaEJzU1ZKQUNkTkszbWRZUVNjcDJ5NmlXdm5IdEFhVWdtZXNJT1l4dW8tQ2VEUzRScEhyU1JTUEtUWWZTVkI3SlJsS01sQmw5R0I2UQ?oc=5" target="_blank">The Ethereum Foundation is u…

item.title: Americans Use AI Every Day—But Most Still Don't Like It, New Poll Shows
item.description: Americans are increasingly using AI tools even as a majority say the technology’s risks outweigh its benefits.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Will Bitcoin follow oil’s historic surge and rally to $79K before the end of March?
item.description: Historical data shows that Bitcoin typically gains 20% within a month of major spikes in oil prices. Should traders prepare for a rally to $79,000?

item.title: Moldova's Anticorruption Center Alleges $107M Crypto Scheme to Influence Elections
item.description: Blockchain analysis firm TRM Labs identified links to a Russia-backed influence operation paying agitators in cryptocurrency.

item.title: Crypto-backed PAC spends $8.6M in Illinois races ahead of US midterms
item.description: The political action committee Fairshake continues to report spending on political candidates from its $193 million war chest, largely funded by crypto interest groups.

item.title: Nasdaq links EU markets to Börse Stuttgart's tokenized settlement venue
item.description: The partnership aims to reduce fragmentation in European capital markets by enabling blockchain-based settlement of tokenized securities.

item.title: NEW: Michael Saylor's Strategy files an amendment that would allow them to sell more shares in premarket and after hours trading to buy more bitcoin 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE84MzJZb1pSM0hHYVB5VzBGUmhwUmY3TF9rUEUyRlRCTVJwT1BocHN5OU1sSG5aQmxXX1l0Ynl1Z1J4cTZjRG1IZDBXYlJKd01WbzJQV1pFWmc0MmtZN2xJeXJtT1pNU1E?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: Michael Saylor's Strat…

item.title: Bitcoin Die-Hard Jack Dorsey Doesn't Like Stablecoins, But Block Will Use Them Anyway
item.description: Jack Dorsey has long been Bitcoin-focused. So why is Block building stablecoin support into Cash App?

item.title: Aon tests stablecoin payments for insurance premiums with Paxos, Coinbase
item.description: The insurance broker is piloting stablecoin payments for premiums using USDC and PYUSD, testing blockchain settlement rails for faster payments in global insurance markets.

item.title: How the war in Iran and trader positioning could be behind the surge in Circle's stock
item.description: Shares were up another 9.7% on Monday, bringing them nearly to double over the past month.

item.title: Zcash Outpaces Bitcoin Gains as Key Development Team Raises $25 Million
item.description: Prominent privacy coin Zcash (ZEC) has jumped 7% over the last day as the Zcash Open Development Lab announced a $25 million fundraise.

item.title: 🚨CRASH: Oil has crashed -32% from $119 to $81, the biggest single-day drop in history. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE9KX1hKOTZXb3hpQXdpNTBRQUtYMnNGblFHVEFlbkJUd1ktR0lXb0ZyWF92a0R2aHN2X1VXSm1SaTVUM29KaHJTY1pfempMZmU1aC1nZklRMDJHZ1h3QXZF?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨CRASH: Oil has crashed -32% from $11…

item.title: Anthropic Sues Trump Admin Over 'Supply Chain Risk' Designation
item.description: The AI company filed a lawsuit in federal court after the Pentagon blacklisted Claude over restrictions on military use.

item.title: Crypto and stocks add to gains as Trump says Iran war could be over soon
item.description: It's been a historic 24 hours for crude oil, which soared to $120 per barrel overnight on Iran worries, but has plunged back to just above $80.

item.title: Bitcoin Price Bounces, But Bears Are Still in Control: Analysis
item.description: Bitcoin broke the descending triangle with a massive candle—then crept right back inside. Today, it's trying again, but the daily chart isn't convincing.

item.title: Sharplink Posts $734 Million Loss as Ethereum Staking Revenue Soars
item.description: The Ethereum-buying firm attributed its full-year performance to the asset’s volatility.

item.title: Wyoming Senator revives crypto tax exemption debate amid market structure talks
item.description: Cynthia Lummis continues to push pro-crypto policies in a market structure bill under consideration in the Senate, even as she prepares to leave Congress in January 2027.

item.title: Coinbase Debuts Crypto Futures for European Traders, Including Bitcoin and Ethereum
item.description: Coinbase launched regulated crypto futures in 26 European countries, offering perpetual and dated contracts with up to 10x leverage.

item.title: Price predictions 3/9: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, ADA, BCH
item.description: Buyers were undeterred by surging oil prices, pushing Bitcoin near $69,500 and large-cap altcoins close to their overhead resistance levels.

item.title: Nigel Farage Backs Bitcoin Treasury Firm Chaired By Former Chancellor
item.description: Reform UK leader Nigel Farage has joined the $333,000 fundraising round for Stack BTC alongside Blockchain.com.

item.title: 🔥 UPDATE: Ethereum Foundation taps Bitwise infrastructure for treasury staking, targeting 70K $ETH staked. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFB4UUxWRWN5VC1BYWVEaFFGSG5nbG9iTGNiUDRRSHY3dklxelhqZmdnQjhVQURrakxRZDk3UWJZcThHa2lnN1VZUmI3YXBmbWZaVVNmMV91RnJHSC1QbUZwZ1BueUo?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 UPDATE: Ethereum Foundation …

item.title: ERC-8183 is one of the missing pieces in the Ethereum Open Agentic Economy we're building. - x402 for micropayments - 8004 for trust and discovery - 8183 for *conditional* payments At the core ERC-8183 is an extensible and flexible escrow mechanism for - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE0xLUg4UXRzNXZRYXkxTkkzMkI1Q2txVmtuZVZmUXN1eWY3X21wbVN5TG5XU3prQ01FY0F0aGl1TzlpSTJ3WHg1MzRnQmJKLUJpSWlZc0R2Vl9qS2pNNk5ERFFndw?oc=5" target="_blank">ERC-8183 is one of the missing p…

item.title: Bitcoin could be the big winner if the U.S.-Iran conflict drags on for months
item.description: Macro strategist Mark Connors says war-driven spending, rising debt and lower interest rates could support bitcoin.

item.title: Bitcoin rises to $69,000, stocks reverse big early losses, as crude oil sinks back below $100
item.description: WTI crude oil, which soared nearly 30% to $120 per barrel overnight, has pulled back to $95, easing pressure on risk assets.

item.title: Bhutan just moved another $11 Million of Bitcoin out of its main holding addresses. The last time they did this was 1 month ago, and they were selling $7 Million of BTC with QCP Capital. Bhutan periodically sells portions of its Bitcoin in clips of $5-10M, with a p - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE0xeWlZaWNBRXkxSkVzWTcxQTB5Wk1uM3Fnd3RoTGUxNVNOYV9GVmRsRjF0ckxBYjVtM1pHdlM3a0R1TUpKUzdRX2lnQW5CWVBWSmRzY3RMQnNvUEk?oc=5" target="_blank">Bhutan just moved another $11 Million of Bi…

item.title: Josh Swihart's Zcash Open Development Lab raises $25 million in seed funding
item.description: The capital will be used to expand development of the Zcash (ZEC) protocol and its privacy-focused self-custodial mobile wallet, Zodl.

item.title: Global insurance broker Aon tests stablecoin payments with Coinbase, Paxos
item.description: The firm used USDC on Ethereum and PayPal USD on Solana for insurance premium payments, testing how stablecoins could reshape settlements.

item.title: Stock market volatility hits one-year high, possibly marking bitcoin bottom
item.description: Bitcoin has its own volatility gauge (BVIV), and that spiked in early February, suggesting crypto markets may have already experienced their panic phase.

item.title: Strategy Drops $1.28 Billion on Bitcoin, Issues $377 Million in Preferred Shares
item.description: Michael Saylor declared the start of a “second century,” following the firm’s 100th Bitcoin purchase last month.

item.title: 20 million #bitcoin now exist. This took 6,267 days. The final 1 million will take 114 years. Here's the time it took to reach other 20 million on-chain milestones on #Bitcoin 👇 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE1rcFdrTmYzVUpNOUdqWlUtbG1DYjRRcGtkQkhCMjF1NlFucFlMMjdiam5JOUs0dVFwelRIeWVXZ29HU1lEWGMxbzRzREFmVFpyRV9QUEhIQUMtV0xtZVVz?oc=5" target="_blank">20 million #bitcoin now exist. This to…

item.title: Bitcoin ETF Flows Cool to $619 Million as Oil Prices Spike
item.description: Crypto funds saw $619M weekly inflow as oil spikes triggered late outflows, with experts split on whether Bitcoin can withstand macro pressure.

item.title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Rebounds to $69K as Oil Skyrockets, Then Cools
item.description: Bitcoin and other crypto coins are rising as oil's surge cools, Polymarket and Kalshi are reportedly raising at massive valuations, and more.
